audit.scope: Post-work audit: TheATeam — Self-Judging Workflow Engine

findings.title: Complete absence of authentication — all endpoints publicly accessible
findings.recommendation: Add JWT/API-key authentication middleware before all /api/* routes

findings.title: Complete absence of authorization — any user can perform any workflow action
findings.recommendation: Implement RBAC with roles (submitter, reviewer, dispatcher, admin)

findings.title: Unauthenticated webhook intake — data poisoning and spam vector
findings.recommendation: Validate Zendesk webhook signature (HMAC-SHA256). Require API key for automated intake. Add rate limiting.

findings.title: No SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown handlers
findings.recommendation: Add process.on('SIGTERM', () => server.close(...)) before app.listen()

findings.title: No unhandledRejection / uncaughtException process guards
findings.recommendation: Register process.on('unhandledRejection') and process.on('uncaughtException') with structured logging

findings.title: Prometheus metrics endpoint publicly exposed
findings.recommendation: Protect /metrics behind IP allowlist or bearer token

findings.title: No input sanitization on title/description — stored XSS vector
findings.recommendation: Apply server-side sanitization to title, description, and reason fields

findings.title: Route override bypasses assessment pod — any user can fast-track any item
findings.recommendation: Restrict overrideRoute parameter to admin role

findings.title: No payload size limits — in-memory store exhaustion / DoS
findings.recommendation: Set express.json({ limit: '16kb' }). Add max work item count guard.

findings.title: No CORS configuration — CSRF vector
findings.recommendation: Install and configure cors package with specific origin

findings.title: Frontend provides no UI to trigger the Assessment Pod
findings.recommendation: Add Assess button to ActionPanel for proposed/reviewing status items

findings.title: Vite proxy hardcodes port 3000 — backend runs on port 3001
findings.recommendation: Change vite.config.ts proxy target to http://localhost:3001. Update E2E test URLs.

findings.title: Route handlers bypass service layer — direct store access in routes
findings.recommendation: Create workItemService.ts wrapping store operations. Routes call services only.

findings.title: Unbounded full-collection scan on GET /api/dashboard/queue
findings.recommendation: Paginate or cap getQueue() results per status group

findings.title: Full-collection sort on every list request — O(N log N) per request
findings.recommendation: Maintain pre-sorted insertion-order index for O(1) slice reads

findings.title: getActivity() nested loop materializes all history before pagination
findings.recommendation: Maintain separate global activity log updated at write time

findings.title: No upper bound on limit query parameter
findings.recommendation: Enforce max page size: Math.min(limit, 100)

findings.title: Queue response includes full WorkItem with unbounded changeHistory/assessments
findings.recommendation: Project shallow summary DTO for queue items, omit changeHistory and assessments

findings.title: NeedsClarification verdict silently mapped to Rejected
findings.recommendation: Add explicit branch for NeedsClarification verdict

findings.title: No idempotency guard on double-route concurrent requests
findings.recommendation: Re-check status inside service layer after fetch (optimistic concurrency)

findings.title: No request body size limit
findings.recommendation: Set express.json({ limit: '16kb' }). Add maxLength on title/description.

findings.title: Unbounded in-memory store — no eviction policy
findings.recommendation: Add periodic purge of soft-deleted items and hard cap on total item count

findings.title: 21 moderate CVEs in jest transitive dependencies
findings.recommendation: npm update jest to v25.0.0+ or npm audit fix

findings.title: Vite transitive CVE via esbuild (CORS bypass)
findings.recommendation: npm update vite to v8.0.3+

findings.title: Vitest 5 transitive moderate CVEs
findings.recommendation: npm update vitest to v4.1.2+

findings.title: ts-jest inherits jest CVE chain
findings.recommendation: npm update ts-jest or npm update jest

findings.title: pino 2 major versions behind (v8 vs v10)
findings.recommendation: npm update pino — evaluate changelog for breaking changes

findings.title: @types/node 5 major versions behind (v20 vs v25)
findings.recommendation: npm update @types/node

findings.title: vite 3 major versions behind (v5 vs v8)
findings.recommendation: npm update vite — plan migration from v5 to v8

findings.title: vitest 2 major versions behind (v2 vs v4)
findings.recommendation: npm update vitest
